text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, November 15. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Budget tracking is updated. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. He is doing so well. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Staying active is key. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Here is what I recommend. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.

text: Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Ready to calculate more rates.

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Ethan did great with his school homework. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
